prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: Two structures side by side. Left: a cafeteria-style spring-loaded plate dispenser labeled "Stack<T>". Plates labeled with values are stacked vertically, with the most recent on top. A hand pushes a new plate on top (push) and an arrow shows the top plate being removed (pop). A "<T>" badge indicates any type of plate. Right: a filing cabinet labeled "Store<T>" with labeled drawer handles (keys) and corresponding value cards inside each drawer. A hand pulls open a drawer by its key to retrieve the value. A "<T>" badge shows the values can be any type.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
